text:
There is a new version of libPropList out, and it's needed to
upgrade this port to update the WindowMaker port to the latest
version.

I've contacted the maintainer, but the email bounced.

Fix: I've taken the liberty to set myself as MAINTAINER, as the current
one is unable to be reached.
